message:
feat(web): Integrate contact support page across site navigation

Footer Navigation:
- Add "Contact Support" link to resourceLinks array
- Links to /contact page for direct support access
- Positioned after "Contribute" for logical grouping of help resources

Help Layout Enhancement:
- Restructure "Need more help?" section to include both support options
- Add internal "Contact support" link with HelpCircle icon
- Maintain existing "Open a GitHub issue" external link
- Wrap both links in flex column for proper stacking
- Add identical mobile-responsive help section at bottom of content area
  (visible on lg:hidden breakpoint) to ensure mobile users have easy
  access to support options

Reserved Usernames:
- Add "contact" to RESERVED_USERNAMES array in system routes section
- Prevents users from registering usernames that conflict with the
  /contact route
- Maintains URL namespace integrity for support functionality

These changes create a cohesive support experience by making the contact
page discoverable from multiple touchpoints throughout the application.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@ const productLinks = [
 
 const resourceLinks = [
   { href: "/contribute", label: "Contribute" },
+  { href: "/contact", label: "Contact Support" },
   { href: "/how_it_was_made", label: "How It Was Made" },
   { href: "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/jeffreysprompts.com", label: "Documentation", external: true },
 ];

@@ -124,15 +124,24 @@ export function HelpLayout({

Need more help?

- - - Open a GitHub issue - +
+ + + Contact support + + + + Open a GitHub issue + +
@@ -161,6 +170,31 @@ export function HelpLayout({ {children} + + {/* Mobile contact support */} +
